title: Milkdown code block Prism plugin wrapper
purpose: Provides a Milkdown plugin wrapper that integrates Prism for syntax highlighting in code blocks using bundled common languages.
module_context: Imports Prism CSS themes for styling highlighted tokens and exports a plugin array that wraps the @milkdown/plugin-prism functionality.

steps.content: Import the Prism CSS themes for token styling.
Export the prism plugin array from @milkdown/plugin-prism.
